## Pre-review checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes locally (lint + format:check + typecheck — same gate CI uses for formatting)
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes (if client or build config changed)

If formatting failed, run `bun run format` and re-check. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details and optional pre-push hooks.
